hero.title: Collab Digital Twins
hero.description: We are a Canadian not-for-profit, stewarding a web-based, non-proprietary platform for the visualization of and interaction with multi-scale geospatial information systems, open data, and BIM models. We are advocates for open digital technologies, the human imagination, and long-term public benefit.
hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.

mission.description: We are bridging BIM and GIS using open standards and free, open-source technologies, enabling stakeholders to visualize and analyze data directly in the browser, eliminating proprietary barriers.

openStandards.title: Open Standards
openStandards.description: Eliminate proprietary barriers and promote interoperability through open standards.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.description: Build with and for the community.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.description: Foster trust and collaborative development through open source code.

imagination.title: Imagination
imagination.description: Challenge current boundaries that limit what is possible with open source digital technologies.

multidisciplinary.title: Multidisciplinary
multidisciplinary.description: Where we are today is evidence that we are stronger and smarter together.

accessible.title: Accessible
accessible.description: Empower everyone with intuitive, user-friendly tools that work directly in the browser.

contributors.title: Join Our Community
contributors.description: Connect with other developers, contributors, and users in our growing community.
contributors.meet: Meet the dedicated individuals steering the CDT Platform

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Whether you're interested in contributing, need support, or want to discuss enterprise solutions, we'd love to hear from you.

deployment.title: Deployment Models
deployment.subtitle: Select the deployment model that best aligns with your organization's technical capabilities and operational requirements.

selfHosted.name: Self-Hosted
selfHosted.description: For organizations with technical expertise and IT infrastructure
selfHosted.feature3: Full control over your data and infrastructure

cdtHosted.name: CDT Hosted
cdtHosted.price: SaaS model with free tier available
cdtHosted.description: For organizations with limited IT resources
cdtHosted.feature6: Generates revenue needed to sustain our mission
